{{Quote|Captain Kreezo trains pilots for Havoc Squadron from his safehouse in Tyrena.|[[Trehla Keelo]], to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:TFS">{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=conversation|Trehla Keelo|Tatooine}}</ref>}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Kreezo''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was known to train new members of [[Havoc Squadron]] and had a small house in [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]] on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. He was known to give [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] to members wishing to join Havoc Squadron.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' {{1st}}
